title: Warm up
content: The slide shows images representing three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts a modern and futuristic aspect of these cities, highlighting their unique characteristics.
key_claims: Beijing is represented with advanced technology.
Chongqing is associated with cultural landscapes.
Hangzhou focuses on connectivity and technology.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide features the title 'An Evolving Nation' with a focus on traveling through China. It includes images of taxis and three cityscapes, suggesting a theme of transport and urban development.
key_claims: China is evolving as a nation.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session involves investigating and researching city features. The process includes analyzing local features, development strategies, and their outcomes and impact.
key_claims: Development strategies lead to positive outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide connects cities with their respective development strategies. Beijing integrates technology and tradition, Chongqing focuses on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou targets tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide highlights development strategies seen from the perspective of taxi drivers. It emphasizes sustainable urban development, tourism, economic growth, and technology integration.
key_claims: Strategies are based on local features.
